SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEBEL, MATHEW AS TO DEFENDANT GRANT, JUSTIN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-02-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-02-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-02-2014 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NEBEL, MATHEW IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GRANT, JUSTIN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
